flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wichita State University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $9.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wichita State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Wichita State University rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (24.7% → 33.2%).
